generationPolicy: Un appel ImageGen distinct pour chaque couche, atlas d’accessoires et atlas de plateformes.

zones.name: Village de Kurokawa
zones.lore: Premier foyer déclaré de la peste du Yomi : maisons brûlées, réserves scellées et routes de quarantaine abandonnées.
zones.gameplay: Zone latérale d’ouverture, lisible grâce au contraste entre ciel indigo, reliefs lointains, village central et avant-plan calciné.

sky.prompt: Create an original opaque modular sky layer in crisp 16-bit pixel art for Kurokawa, a plague-struck village in fictional late-feudal Japan. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Show only a deep indigo nocturnal sky, high soot clouds, faint stars, ember haze near the low horizon and restrained fire glow. Absolutely no land, mountain, tree, bamboo, building, house, roof, tower, torii, road, prop, person, creature, text, logo, border, grid, transparency or chroma key. Fully opaque and repeat-friendly.

far.prompt: Create one original modular far parallax layer in crisp 16-bit pixel art for Kurokawa. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Show only distant natural terrain: layered indigo mountain silhouettes, wooded ridges and a thin smoke veil across the lower half. Absolutely no houses, roofs, towers, torii, roads, fences, props or other human-made element. Flat uniform exact #ff00ff background, clean hard pixel silhouettes, no characters, creatures, text, logo, labels, border or grid.

mid.prompt: Create one original modular middle parallax architecture band in crisp 16-bit pixel art for plague-struck Kurokawa. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Along a common baseline show several late-feudal minka houses with tiled and thatched roofs, one rice storehouse, one wooden watchtower, leafless persimmon trees and small attached roof fires, with readable gaps between forms. No sky, ground platform, road, loose prop sheet, character, creature, weapon or text. Flat uniform exact #ff00ff background, clean hard pixel silhouettes, no labels, logo, border or grid.

near.prompt: Create one original modular near parallax foreground layer in crisp 16-bit pixel art for plague-struck Kurokawa. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Show only charred road-edge silhouettes around the bottom 18 percent and outer edges: broken fence pieces, scorched reeds, a partial wagon wheel and black branches entering from left and right, while preserving a broad empty center. No house, tower, gameplay platform, character, creature, weapon or text. Flat uniform exact #ff00ff background, hard pixel edges, no labels, logo, border or grid.

profiles.name: Tour de guet de Kurokawa — face
Tour de guet de Kurokawa — vue 3/4 arrière-plan

props.prompt: Create one original 16-bit pixel-art ASSET ATLAS for the plague village zone “Kurokawa” in a side-scrolling game set in fictional late-feudal Japan. STRICT technical layout: exactly 4 columns × 3 rows = exactly 12 equal cells, aligned to a regular invisible grid, with one complete isolated asset centered in every cell, generous uniform empty gutters, nothing crossing a cell boundary, no extra objects. The entire background and every gutter must be perfectly flat, uniform, exact chroma-key magenta #ff00ff. Do not draw grid lines, borders, frames, panels, shadows, ground, labels, numbers, text, Japanese writing, logos, watermarks, characters, creatures, weapons, or UI. Orthographic side-view game sprites, consistent scale within type, crisp hard-edged 16-bit pixel art, limited indigo/charcoal/burnt-wood/muted-red palette, clean silhouette, no antialias fringe. Exact cell contents in reading order left-to-right, top-to-bottom: row 1: (1) intact tiled-roof minka house, (2) burned thatched minka house, (3) small white-plaster rice storehouse kura, (4) wooden village watchtower. Row 2: (5) stone well, (6) leafless scorched persimmon tree, (7) broken handcart, (8) low wooden village barrier. Row 3: (9) sealed provision barrel, (10) bundled haystack, (11) small contained burning hearth with orange embers, (12) tiny roadside protective altar with no writing or religious text. Original designs, no existing-game likeness.

platforms.prompt: Create one original 16-bit pixel-art GAMEPLAY PLATFORM AND TILE ATLAS for the plague village zone “Kurokawa” in a side-scrolling game set in fictional late-feudal Japan. STRICT technical layout: exactly 4 columns × 3 rows = exactly 12 equal cells, aligned to a regular invisible grid, one complete isolated side-view terrain piece centered in every cell, generous uniform empty gutters, nothing crossing cell boundaries, no extra objects. The entire background and gutters must be perfectly flat, uniform, exact chroma-key magenta #ff00ff. No grid lines, borders, frames, panels, shadows outside pieces, labels, numbers, text, logos, watermark, characters, creatures, weapons, buildings, or UI. Crisp hard-edged 16-bit pixel art, consistent 2D side-platform perspective and thickness, tileable-looking ends where appropriate, indigo soil, gray stone, burnt cedar, dark roof tile and straw palette. Exact contents in reading order left-to-right, top-to-bottom: row 1: (1) central packed-earth floor tile with flat playable top, (2) left-edge packed-earth floor tile, (3) right-edge packed-earth floor tile, (4) cracked packed-earth floor variant. Row 2: (5) long suspended burnt-wood platform, (6) short suspended burnt-wood platform, (7) suspended dark ceramic roof-tile platform, (8) suspended thatch platform. Row 3: (9) low stone ledge, (10) wooden stair step cluster, (11) packed-earth slope rising to the right, (12) ash-pit hazard rim with hollow dark center. Original designs, no existing-game likeness.

zones.name: Sanctuaire de bambous
zones.lore: Un sanctuaire rural noyé dans la bambouseraie, où les rites de purification ont été interrompus par la contamination.
zones.gameplay: Zone verticale et mobile : lune rouge, reliefs naturels, torii central et avant-plan de racines encadrent les combats.

sky.prompt: Create an original 16-bit pixel-art environment layer for a game set in a fictional late-feudal Japan during a zombie plague. This is ONLY the opaque SKY layer for the zone “Bamboo Shrine”, designed for horizontal parallax in a side-scrolling game. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Show a deep nocturnal blue-black sky, a huge muted crimson moon slightly right of center, sparse thin clouds, faint mist glow and a few dim stars. Keep the lower horizon simple so other transparent layers can overlap it. Absolutely no ground, mountains, hills, trees, bamboo, branches, torii, shrine, pagoda, roof, house, lantern, prop, character, creature, weapon, interface, logo, lettering, symbols, labels, watermark, border, panels, grid, transparency, checkerboard, or chroma-key background. Fully opaque edge to edge. Crisp hard-edged 16-bit pixel art, limited palette, no anti-aliased painterly blur, no gradients that look photographic. Original design, not based on any existing game asset.

far.prompt: Create one original modular PARALLAX FAR-LAYER bitmap in crisp 16-bit pixel art for a side-scrolling game set in a fictional late-feudal Japanese bamboo shrine during a zombie plague. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Show ONLY distant natural terrain: two or three layered silhouettes of bamboo-covered ridges, thin rows of very distant bamboo trunks, and low blue-violet mist, occupying mainly the lower 45 percent with an irregular skyline and generous empty space above. Muted indigo palette, subtle crimson rim light compatible with a red moon behind it. The entire backdrop behind every visible pixel must be a perfectly flat, uniform, exact chroma-key magenta #ff00ff, including all four corners. Hard pixel edges and clean silhouettes, no antialias fringe, no cast shadow outside objects. Absolutely no house, shrine, torii, pagoda, roof, bridge, lantern, fence, road, stairs, human-made structure, separate prop, character, creature, weapon, text, logo, labels, watermark, panels, borders, or grid. One continuous far-distance layer only; original design, not copied from any existing game.

mid.prompt: Create one original modular PARALLAX MID-LAYER bitmap in crisp 16-bit pixel art for a side-scrolling game set at a fictional late-feudal Japanese bamboo shrine during a zombie plague. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Build a single coherent middle-distance silhouette band along a common lower baseline: tall bamboo trunks and leafy clusters across the width, a large weathered vermilion torii slightly left of center, a compact rural wooden shrine with tiled roof slightly right of center, two integrated stone lanterns, and thin drifting plague mist. Leave readable gaps between major shapes and a traversable-looking open center. Moonlit indigo, moss green, dark wood, worn muted red palette. The entire backdrop behind every visible pixel must be perfectly flat, uniform, exact chroma-key magenta #ff00ff, including all four corners. Hard pixel edges, clean silhouettes, no antialias fringe and no cast shadows outside the layer. No sky, no distant mountains, no ground platform, no loose item sheet, no character, zombie, creature, weapon, text, Japanese writing, logo, labels, watermark, panel divisions, border, or grid. One continuous scenery layer only; original design, not copied from any existing game.

near.prompt: Create one original modular PARALLAX NEAR-LAYER bitmap in crisp 16-bit pixel art for a side-scrolling game set at a fictional late-feudal Japanese bamboo shrine during a zombie plague. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Show foreground scenery ONLY around the outer edges and lowest 20 percent: a dark mossy stone path lip along parts of the bottom, thick bamboo leaves and cut stalk silhouettes framing the left and right edges, a few gnarled roots, ferns, damp rocks, and small pale fungal growths attached to the roots. Preserve a broad empty central viewing area and avoid a solid full-width floor. Dark indigo, black-green, moss and muted fungal ivory palette with restrained crimson moon rim light. The entire backdrop behind every visible pixel must be perfectly flat, uniform, exact chroma-key magenta #ff00ff, including all four corners wherever no foreground object exists. Hard pixel edges, clean silhouettes, no antialias fringe and no cast shadows outside objects. No sky, mountain, house, shrine, torii, pagoda, bridge, free-standing prop, character, zombie, creature, weapon, text, symbols, logo, labels, watermark, panel divisions, border, or grid. One continuous foreground framing layer only; original design, not copied from any existing game.

zones.name: Château du daimyō
zones.lore: Le cœur politique de Kurokawa, transformé en forteresse de quarantaine puis en nid de la peste du Yomi.
zones.gameplay: Zone finale compatible avec le passage latéral/FPS : extérieur fortifié au plan moyen et cadre intérieur contaminé au premier plan.

sky.prompt: Create an original 16-bit pixel-art environment layer for a game set in a fictional late-feudal Japanese castle during a zombie plague. This is ONLY the opaque SKY layer for the zone “Daimyo Castle”, designed for horizontal parallax in a side-scrolling game and to match a sinister first-person castle segment. Exact wide 16:9 composition. Show a stormy charcoal-indigo night sky, a smaller blood-orange moon high left, layered wind-torn clouds and a faint reddish glow near the low horizon. Keep the lower area simple for transparent castle layers to overlap. Absolutely no ground, mountain, hill, forest, tree, bamboo, castle, tower, roof, wall, shoji, torii, building, lantern, prop, character, creature, weapon, interface, logo, lettering, symbols, labels, watermark, border, panels, grid, transparency, checkerboard, or chroma-key background. zones.name: Tokyo contemporain en quarantaine
zones.lore: La faille du Yomi projette Akio dans un Tokyo contemporain où la même contamination a survécu sous une quarantaine moderne.
zones.gameplay: Rues, station et équipements urbains forment des routes horizontales lisibles, avec accès en profondeur et plateformes architecturales cohérentes.

sky.prompt: Opaque storm sky over contemporary Tokyo, moonlit rain and a restrained red Yomi fracture; no architecture or characters.

far.prompt: Transparent far skyline of contemporary Tokyo on a flat green chroma background.

mid.prompt: Transparent coherent row of Japanese urban façades, station frontage and neighborhood shrine on green chroma.

near.prompt: Transparent near foreground of wet road edges, cables and quarantine debris with an open gameplay center.

props.prompt: Twelve separate front-orthographic contemporary Japanese street props in a strict 4 by 3 green-chroma atlas.

platforms.prompt: Twelve separate side-orthographic contemporary street platforms and hazards in a strict 4 by 3 green-chroma atlas.

zones.name: Neo-Tokyo sous la pluie de néons
zones.lore: Une seconde rupture temporelle mène Akio dans Neo-Tokyo, où le Yomi s'est greffé aux réseaux et aux infrastructures de la cité.
zones.gameplay: Passerelles techniques, ruines du maglev et sanctuaires cybernétiques composent un acte final horizontal à embranchements.

sky.prompt: Opaque Neo-Tokyo night sky with rain, distant neon haze and restrained Yomi fracture; no architecture or characters.

far.prompt: Transparent far arcology skyline and maglev silhouettes on a flat green chroma background.

mid.prompt: Transparent coherent Neo-Tokyo façade row mixing cybernetic infrastructure and Japanese rooflines on green chroma.

near.prompt: Transparent near foreground of cables, service rails and neon debris with an open gameplay center.

props.prompt: Twelve separate front-orthographic cyberpunk Japanese props in a strict 4 by 3 green-chroma atlas.

platforms.prompt: Twelve separate side-orthographic cyberpunk street platforms and hazards in a strict 4 by 3 green-chroma atlas.

zones.name: Forêt ancienne de Kai
zones.lore: Les cèdres sacrés de Kai étouffent une ancienne route de charbonniers, désormais contaminée par des racines venues du Yomi.
zones.gameplay: Un niveau forestier horizontal à chemins superposés, troncs franchissables, racines en pente, ruisseaux et haltes de quarantaine abandonnées.

sky.prompt: Opaque moonlit night sky above the ancient Kai forest, with indigo storm clouds and restrained Yomi haze; no terrain or characters.

far.prompt: Distant wooded mountain silhouettes and mist bands for Kai forest, isolated on a flat magenta chroma background.

mid.prompt: Coherent middle-distance band of giant ancient cedars, a charcoal burner shelter and ward ropes, isolated on magenta chroma.

near.prompt: Near forest framing of roots, ferns, broken branches and fog with an open gameplay center, isolated on magenta chroma.

props.prompt: Twelve separate front-orthographic Kai forest props in a strict 4 by 3 magenta-chroma atlas.

platforms.prompt: Twelve separate side-orthographic forest earth, log, root, stone and hazard platforms in a strict 4 by 3 magenta-chroma atlas.

zones.name: Rizières de Tsuru
zones.lore: Les rizières de Tsuru, autrefois grenier du domaine, ont été noyées pour ralentir les infectés avant que la peste n'empoisonne les canaux.
zones.gameplay: Un niveau rural ouvert alternant digues, passerelles, toits de grange, canaux et raccourcis en profondeur autour des cultures condamnées.

sky.prompt: Opaque storm sky over the flooded Tsuru rice fields, with cold dawn light and distant plague smoke; no terrain or characters.

far.prompt: Distant rural hills, levees and tree silhouettes behind Tsuru fields, isolated on a flat magenta chroma background.

mid.prompt: Coherent middle-distance rice-field band with watermill, hut, bridges and flooded paddies, isolated on magenta chroma.

near.prompt: Near rice-field framing of reeds, water channels, broken fencing and muddy banks with an open center, isolated on magenta chroma.

props.prompt: Twelve separate front-orthographic Tsuru field props in a strict 4 by 3 magenta-chroma atlas.

platforms.prompt: Twelve separate side-orthographic paddy dikes, planks, roofs, stone ledges and hazards in a strict 4 by 3 magenta-chroma atlas.
